values.description: Production base URL — Traefik + TLS via *.deviaaps.com
JWT Bearer token — populated automatically by POST Login test script
MongoDB ObjectId of the last created task — populated by POST Create Task test script

info.name: API Tareas Express — Production
info.description:
Entorno de producción para api-tareas-express.

Flujo rápido:
1. Ejecutar POST Login con credenciales válidas → authToken se guarda automáticamente
2. Ejecutar POST Create Task → taskId se guarda automáticamente
3. Usar cualquier endpoint de Tasks

Swagger UI: https://api-tareas-express.deviaaps.com/api-docs
